name: The Performance Opportunity
effect: Identify areas where performance could theoretically improve. This card is considered insightful.

clauses.name: REFRAME CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If a metric is underperforming: It is designated a performance opportunity.

clauses.name: HORIZON EFFECT
clauses.rule: If no timeline is specified: The opportunity is considered perpetually imminent.

clauses.name: ACCOUNTABILITY OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If the opportunity is never realized: The identification of the opportunity is still considered progress.

witness_quote: We're seeing some real upside here.
